allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "perfil exists on disk:"; Test-Path "app\\perfil\\page.tsx"; Write-Output "carousel exists on disk:"; Test-Path "components\\activities\\ActivityImageCarousel.tsx"; Write-Output "diff lines for next.config.ts:"; \(git diff -- next.config.ts | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "status for new files:"; git status --short -- app/perfil components/activities/ActivityImageCarousel.tsx supabase/migrations)
PowerShell(try { $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; Write-Output "WORD_OK $\($w.Version\)"; $w.Quit\(\) } catch { Write-Output "WORD_NO" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://redescubreapp.com/proveedor/registro" -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { "Status: $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) Location: $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" } else { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://redescubreapp.com/proveedor/registro" -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; "redescubreapp.com -> $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://re-descubre.vercel.app/proveedor/registro" -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 0 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "vercel.app -> $\($r2.StatusCode\) \(sirve la página directamente, NO redirige al dominio\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; "vercel.app -> $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "redescubreapp.com -> %{http_code} Location: %{redirect_url}`n" -I "https://redescubreapp.com/proveedor/registro"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "www.redescubreapp.com -> %{http_code} Location: %{redirect_url}`n" -I "https://www.redescubreapp.com/proveedor/registro"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "re-descubre.vercel.app -> %{http_code} Location: %{redirect_url}`n" -I "https://re-descubre.vercel.app/proveedor/registro")
PowerShell(npx vercel domains ls; npx vercel alias ls | Select-Object -First 15)
